title: re-arrange coulms in input section

posts.author: Rutger_SAU (Rutger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Is there a way to re-arrange the columns in the input section? They now seem to appear based on creation date of the column. When I move a column in the board it doesn’t change in the input section.

Also the settings of the input section give me the option to re-arrange them.

Thank you.

Rutger

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: When you’re moving the columns, are you on the main view or on a filtered view?
